aeronautics: The flagship. **levitite→ars imbuement (M-10)** is the key creative edge — makes the lift reagent a magic-gated material, tying the logistics arm to the magic pillar. M-13 fuel ownership is reserved here. Densest authoring target.
aeronautics_dyeable_components: 0 accepts — pure cosmetic add-on to Aeronautics. Agree leave; light tick.
aileron: M-10 elytra-enchant via ars is the only edge and it's thin; aileron is a flight-control tweak. Low priority, probably leave.
alcohol_industry: M-09 spirits-sell + M-12 alcohol_base as a *solvent that feeds other recipes* (the useful-intermediate form of M-12) + M-10 imbuement. The solvent-intermediate is the keeper edge. Relevant to #241 (it's the existing 'wine-adjacent' but does beer/spirits, no wine).
alexsmobs: Huge mob-drop hub (M-11/M-02/M-10 + M-15 void_worm_beak). **#168 overlaps Naturalist** — resolve dup-trim first. Top survival feedstock once curated.
appleseed: = Diet AppleSeed — it IS the diet-demand pressure (M-26), the survival lever that pulls on all food production. Not a weave node so much as the demand engine; config-tune, don't recipe-weave. Central to the loop's pressure side.
ars_nouveau: The magic SPINE (M-01 source_gem currency). Hub the other magic mods mint into. Sourcelinks (M-02/M-16) consuming mob/crop surplus tie magic↔survival. Highest magic-pillar priority.
astikorcartsredux: M-05 plow/cart gated on Create pressed iron — already 91-astikor-carts.js. Confirm existing weave; extend the M-20 implement upgrades.
bakery: Let's Do Bakery — M-12 wheat→flour + M-28 colony-cook demand. Note: this whole Let's Do tree is under cut-review (#241); resolve that FIRST, then author survivors.
beachparty: Let's Do Beachparty — M-12 coconut milling + M-09 cocktails. Same #241 cut-review caveat; it's the weakest Let's Do island.
betterdungeons: Loot-seed mod — M-02/M-08/M-15 chest seeding. Pure datapack loot edits; batch all YUNG's dungeons together as one loot-seed pass.
bettermineshafts: Loot-seed (M-02/M-08). Batch with the YUNG's loot pass.
bits_n_bobs: Agree — already 2-anchor; the M-04 stone-tile crush is a low-priority deco-loop tightening, batch it.
born_in_chaos_v1: M-03 dark_metal crush + M-11 bones→spirit_fire + M-15 boss-staff gates. Good boss/occult feedstock. Note #83 already throttles its spawns (perf).
bountiful: 22 accepts, but most ride **M-14 bounty→coin which is CUT** (#163/#240 — NPC coin faucet). Re-scope its payouts to goods/rep, not minted coin. The M-16 (seasonal objectives) + M-12 (Create-good objectives) edges are the keepers. Flag for the v0.9 economy ruling.
brazil_legends: capelobo_claw/amber→spirit_fire+imbuement (M-11/M-10 ×26/21). Dense magic feedstock. Author magic-side.
byzantine: M-28 colony-style only; it's a MineColonies schematic pack — leave as colony-route support.
cataclysm: **The primary boss-drop route (M-15)** — ancient_metal/witherite/cursium → Create gates + spirit_fire. This is the #92 fork's main supplier. Top survival-pillar priority; author the boss gates here.
cbc_at: Create Big Cannons Advanced Tech — M-15 boss-gate endgame autocannon/rocket. Good high-tier gate; pairs with createbigcannons. Author the boss gates.
charta: M-04 card_table cutting + M-33 dealer service + M-12 glassware. Tavern/social mod; the M-33 player-run-gambling service is a fun economy edge. Medium; mind public-server tone.
chefsdelight: ⚠ **Runs on emerald economy** (GATE2 flagged) — its Cook/Chef trades don't unify with Numismatics coin. Reconcile in the v0.9 economy review (re-denominate to coin) before authoring.
cmpackagecouriers: Logistics; M-06 cardboard_plane assembly is minor. M-29 remote-delivery is the logistics role itself. Light.
cmpackagepipebomb: 0 accepts — novelty. Leave (and eyeball for griefing balance on a public server).
cold_sweat: hearth via Create mechanical_crafting (M-05 ×31, highest M-05 in pack) + M-16 temperature↔seasons. Cold Sweat is the temperature survival lever; the hearth-gate is a strong Create tie. High priority.
companions: crystallized_blood/soul_gem→spirit_fire/imbuement (M-11/M-10) + M-08 relic_gold mint. Strong magic+economy. Author magic-side.
cookingforblockheads: M-05 oven/fridge gated on Create (×27) + M-28 colony-kitchen. Good Create gate for the kitchen appliances. Author Create+colony.
copperagebackport: M-04 copper-deco crush. Tag-batch. Note it's a backport — check it's still needed once 1.21.x copper lands. Low.
copycats: M-23 hull-cladding is the real prize (deco→required aeronautics supply); author in v0.9. M-04 trivial.
create_better_villagers: M-08/M-21 Create-parts villager trades → re-denominate emerald to coin. Mind the trade-faucet caution; author with the v0.9 economy ruling.
create_central_kitchen: M-09/M-28 automated-feast → colony supply. Pairs with createfood — overlap audit. Author colony-side.
create_cheese: M-12 curds + M-35 maturation + M-09 sell. The Create cheese pipeline (#51 bridge). Note overlap with meadow/expandeddelight cheese — unify the cheese cluster.
create_compressed: M-23 bulk airframe supply is natural; mind the #102 compressed-uranium interaction during carbon-unify.
create_confectionery: M-09 sell + M-04 chocolate-brick crush + M-10 ruby-chocolate imbuement (cute). Food deco; medium.
create_connected: M-06 kinetic_battery/control_chip = textbook step-depth targets (#219); author now.
create_dragons_plus: M-10 dragon_breath→imbuement + M-16 freezing. Niche; fan-bulk methods. Low-medium.
create_enchantment_industry: Best cross-route node in the batch (liquid XP forces Create↔magic coordination). **M-29/M-33 need Gate-0** before authoring.
create_factory: Already 2-anchor (Create+survival). M-28 cream/jam→colony-cook demand is the good economy edge (the colony fork, #92). Overlaps create_ultimate_factory — make the cut/dedup call on the two together.
create_hypertube: Its own sequenced-assembly is already the gate; no new weave needed. Leave.
create_integrated_farming: M-12 egg/roost + M-02 feather→imbuement. Farming automation; ties survival↔magic via sourcelinks. Author with farming.
create_ironworks: Multi-anchor; central to #103 plate-dedup — its M-23 airframe demand is the reason to UNIFY, not cut.
create_jetpack: M-15 netherite-jetpack boss-gate = ready second example of the #92 fork; cheap, author now.
create_ltab-3.9.2: Loot-seed mod (Let The Adventure Begin) — M-08 coin seeding into its structures is fine, author with v0.9 economy.
create_mobile_packages: M-29 port network = its logistics role. Leave-ish.
create_new_age: rung-5 of the power ladder (#145). M-30 thorium-gate + M-17 FE→magic are top priority. Corium→spirit_fire (M-11) is a nice nuclear-waste→occult touch.
create_sa: = Create Stuff'N Additions; M-15 boss-gate the top jetpack and fold into the #87 balance pass. Blazing-tools→imbuement (M-10) is a clean magic edge.
create_train_parts: M-20 brass-window pressing — minor deco-depth. Fine, low priority.
create_tweaked_controllers: M-24 control-surface→aeronautics is a neat tie (controllers as ship control input). Author with aeronautics.
create_ultimate_factory: **The batch's biggest risk** — renewable diamond/blaze synthesis erodes the scarcity axiom. Escalate to a v0.7.0 trim/gate/cut action; overlaps create_factory. Follow-up filed.
createaddition: rung-4 power converter; my 'electricity is a converter not a source' rule hinges on it. M-17 (FE→Iron's gear) is the canonical electric↔magic bridge. Top #145 priority.
createbigcannons: M-08 cannon-steel→mint + M-23 steel→airframe + M-34 munitions trade. Steel ties #103. Author with the combat/steel work.
createblockchain: M-30 mining_core geode-scarcity + M-08 FE-traced coin. Novel but watch it doesn't become an idle coin faucet — confirm the FE traces to *scarce* metal, else it's an M-08 violation.
createfisheryindustry: M-09 seafood + M-16 bait-trap + M-23 fish_skin→airframe (leather substitute, neat). Fishing-cluster overlap (tide/spawn) — dedup.
createfood: Already 2-anchor (food+Create). M-16 seasonal-ingredients + M-28 colony supply. Solid; the seasonal tie is the deepening edge.
createimmersivetacz: Mostly M-09 ammo-sell (ambient) — the real edge is M-12 nitropowder via TFMG vat (a cross-route fuel/chem dependency). Ties #112/#185 gun work.
createlowheated: Agree it's no weave node — but it IS a heat tier for the #145 ladder; cross-link, don't drop.
createmechanicalcompanion: M-15 wolf-link loot + M-24 booster-rocket→aeronautics. Niche companion mod; thin. Low.
createmetalwork: Central to #103; M-03 magic-ore-doubling (occultism/galosphere ores through its crush) is a clean Create↔magic bridge. Strong.
createnuclear: rung-5 power. Uranium→hardest coin tier (M-08) is a satisfying endgame capstone. Radiation-survival REJECT correct (waits on M-25/#222). Steel→airframe → #103.
createoreexcavation: Oil-vein→TFMG-diesel→engine (M-13) is a great logistics line. Watch GTMOGS (#93) so the drill doesn't trivialize regional scarcity.
createpickywheels: M-16 biome-gated water-wheel = a behavior constraint, not a recipe weave; ties the #145 power ladder (water rung is terrain-sited). Note in #145.
createtreadmill: rung-0 power (player labor); the M-26 labor-as-pressure framing is on-theme for early game. Minor; note in #145.
ctl: Dup of create_tweaked_controllers (0 accepts here). Mapper noise — merge.
ctov: ChoiceTheorem villages — loot-seed (M-02/M-08/M-14). Batch with structures.
deeperdarker: soul_dust→spirit_fire (M-11 ×32, the single highest-consensus magic sink) + heart_of_the_deep (Warden, M-15) + M-04 gloomslate. Premier occult+boss feedstock. Top priority, author magic+survival.
dndesires: rubber via hydraulic press (M-24/M-23 → aeronautics) is the standout — a real industrial-rubber supply for ship parts. Plus M-12 milkshake food. Strong; author aeronautics-side.
domum_ornamentum: M-04 via its own architects_cutter is the bridge; M-28 colony tie is natural (it's the colony deco system). Author colony-side.
drones: = Buddy Drones — M-06 ion_thruster + M-05 rotor sequenced assembly (×23/20). Strong step-depth; already 90-drones.js. Extend; ties aeronautics.
dtterralith: Dynamic Trees Terralith compat — M-12 exotic-seed milling. Minor; perf-adjacent. Light.
dungeons_arise_seven_seas: Loot-seed; M-15 galleon→aeronautics-loot is the themed edge (naval ruins → airship parts). Batch with structure loot pass.
dynamictrees: M-10 dendro_potion→imbuement + M-12 branch milling. Perf-adjacent (it's a tree-render system). Light weave; main value is perf, not web.
dynamictreesplus: M-12 saguaro_fruit milling (×33, the single highest-consensus candidate in the pack) + cactus/mushroom. Easy high-confidence M-12 author. Quick win.
ecologics: M-12 coconut milling + M-10 coconut_slice (clears effects → imbuement). Standard biome mod; medium.
edf-remastered-5.0-beta4: Ender Dragon Fight Remastered — M-15 dragon-as-endgame-gate via loot-seed. The dragon becomes a real tech gate; author the dragon-drop gate. Good capstone.
endermoon: M-22 lunar ender-pearl supply (×12) — the moon-event reagent motif. Pairs with enhancedcelestials under M-22 (apply across ALL moons). Author the lunar gates.
endrem: End Remastered — undead_eye/eyes→ritual/imbuement (M-11/M-10). Themed magic feedstock + gates the End. Author magic-side.
enhancedcelestials: meteor→crush (M-04 ×31) + Blood/Harvest/Blue moon state (M-22 ×24). The core lunar-reagent + Harvest-Moon-growth (M-16) mod. Author M-22/M-16 here; high value.
expandeddelight: salt_ore crush (M-03 ×32) + cheese (M-09/M-35) + cinnamon milling (M-12). Dense food node; cheese-cluster overlap (create_cheese/meadow) — unify.
exposure: M-12 silver→film + M-35 photo-aging + M-09 sell. Charming self-contained chain; the silver→film ties the metal economy. Medium.
extradelight: **Load-bearing cut-vertex** (per CONNECTIVITY) — M-12 processing hub + M-28 colony + M-16 seasonal feast. The delight web's spine; preserve and author its M-12/M-28 edges. High priority.
farm_and_charm: Load-bearing (the mincer ore-route + M-12 grain milling, ×31). Under #241 cut-review but it's the *keep* anchor of the Let's Do tree — its M-23/M-28 ties argue strongly for keeping.
farmersdelight: The delight-family root — M-12 crop→flour + M-28 colony + M-16 seasonal. Foundational food node; author the M-12 milling + seasonal gates. High.
formations: Structure-lib; M-02 altar loot-seed only. Mostly support. Light.
friendsandfoes: M-02 crab_claw→imbuement (×27 consensus, very high) + M-04 copper deco crush. Solid mob-drop sinks; author with magic/survival.
fxntstorage: = Create: Storage. M-06 backpack-tier sequenced assembly is fine step-depth. Low priority.
galosphere: ⚠ M-03/M-08 on `silver_ingot` = **PALLADIUM** (CLAUDE.md gotcha) — must mint/tag as palladium, never silver. M-07 allurite/lumiere attunement is already established. Author carefully.
gamediscs: M-05 processor/circuit via Create — already its own #170 weave. Author the Create-gated console there.
gnkinetics: Clean single second anchor (M-24 gears→drivetrain); gives the gear expansion purpose. Author v0.9.
gravestone: M-33 death-record service is a stretch; gravestone is QoL. Leave.
grimoireofgaia: Dense mob-drop sinks (M-11/M-03/M-10 ×16/12/9). Good magic/Create feedstock. Note the #168 dup-mob trim may cut some GoG mobs first — sequence after that.
gtmogs: The scarcity FOUNDATION (M-30) — it's the substrate every regional-ore weave (mint, fuel, steel) depends on, not a content node itself. Author #93 first; everything M-30/M-08 hangs off it.
handcrafted: M-12 furniture via Create cutting + M-28 colony + M-04 crush. Big furniture surface; tag-batch the cutting. Medium; colony tie is nice.
hpm: Unmapped — this is a ship/vessel mod (corvette/hull/cannon). M-06/M-23 hull-via-sequenced-assembly + M-05 cannon are sound; but it overlaps createbigcannons + aeronautics hulls — review for redundancy before authoring. Needs a slug map + milestone.
illagerinvasion: hallowed_gem (M-02/M-15) + platinum_chunk (M-03 ×22) — strong boss/magic feedstock. Author with magic+survival.
immersive_armors: M-05 heavy-set via Create pressing (×27) + M-10 divine-set via ars enchanting. Splits the armor line tech/magic — exactly the two-route design. Strong; ties #87-style balance.
irons_spellbooks: M-01 arcane_essence↔source_gem (the magic-bridge) + M-03 mithril crush. Author with ars as the unified magic progression (#75 already started this).
just_blahaj: 0 accepts — a plush block. Leave (flavor; keep for morale).
kobolds: M-02/M-11 kobold_skull→spirit_fire. Single clean magic sink. Fine.
letsdocompat: Let's Do glue (0 accepts) — leave; resolve with #241.
mcwdoors: M-04 metal-door crush only. Batch all Macaw's mods into one M-04 stone/metal crush-back tag-recipe (don't spam wood variants).
mcwfences: M-04 metal-fence crush. Batch with Macaw's M-04 sweep.
mcwroofs: M-04 stone/brick roof crush (the chunk-01 worked example — stone variants only, tag-batched). Batch.
mcwstairs: M-04 stone-stair crush, thin. Batch with Macaw's.
mcwwindows: M-04 stone parapet/arrow-slit crush. Batch with Macaw's.
meadow: M-12 alpine_salt milling + M-09 cheese + M-35 cheese-maturation. The salt/biome is the unique keep-value (#241). Cheese already bridges Create Cheese (#51). Keep-leaning.
mffs: M-05/M-15 force-field gated on Create parts + colony research — already woven (60-mffs.js). The M-15 colony-protection tie is nice. Confirm existing weave still holds.
minecolonies: Load-bearing **production route** (M-28/M-37 colony + research), not just economy. The M-09 colony-food-sell is the colony's economic output. This is the #92/#220 colony fork — high priority, author across v0.9/v0.7.
minecolonies_compatibility: Colony-job→trade glue; M-09/M-28 colony output. Support-tier, author with minecolonies.
minecolonies_tweaks: M-12 c:crops tag-unification = it ENABLES weaves (like a lib). Agree — glue, not a node.
moblassos: M-28 villager/livestock transport feeding colonies is the coherent edge; otherwise thin. Low.
modulargolems: M-10/M-15 golem assembly consuming boss-metals + magic reagents — a great cross-pillar sink (magic+survival+Create). Already has 30-modular-golems.js; extend.
more_slabs_stairs_and_walls: 847 blocks — M-04/M-12 cut-variant crushing, **tag-batched only** (never per-variant). The #113 island-prune already eyed this; one tag recipe closes it.
mowziesmobs: ice_crystal (M-15/M-06 ×17) + elokosa_paw (M-22 lunar). Top boss/lunar feedstock; the M-22 moon-gated imbuement is a standout. Author with survival+magic.
mushroomquest: Real anchors are **two, not three** — M-12 (cook) + M-11 (transmute caps to magic reagents). The M-09 'rare caps → sell' is RETIRED (player-driven economy ≠ vendor sell), so drop it. Decent food+magic story, but it's a 59-item island (CONNECTIVITY) and everyday mushrooms overlap dynamictreesplus + delight. Cut-review filed (#255); to make it economy-relevant, gate a real *consumer* of rare caps, not a sell price.
mutantszombies: Thin (M-11/M-14 generic drops). Note #168 dup-mob trim may target it. Sequence after curation.
naturalist: M-02 antler/glow_goop→imbuement + M-12 venison cutting. **#168 overlaps Alex's Mobs** — resolve the dup-trim before authoring so we don't weave a cut mob.
northstar: Multi-anchor (titanium/tungsten/martian_steel → mint + airframe + biofuel). Like tfmg/ironworks, its metals feed M-23 airframes — preserve in #103. Strong v0.9 node.
numismatics: Hub — weaves TO, not from (like create). M-05 self-recipe only. Leave; it's the economy's root.
occultengineering: M-08 sterling_silver→mint + M-18 spirit_solution. The Create↔occult bridge (already 36-magic-web-create.js). Author with occultism.
occultism: Magic pillar co-spine (M-11 spirit_fire ritual sink + M-18 miner logistics + M-03 real-silver). The universal mob-drop transmutation sink. Top magic priority; author with ars.
oceansdelight: M-09 seafood sells + M-12 cutting. Standard food mod. Author with food pillar.
pantographsandwires: **Central to #102** — coal_coke (M-32/M-12 via tfmg:coking) + graphite (M-17 energising). This mod IS the carbon-chain seam; author the graphite/graphene unify here.
quark: M-04 deco crush + M-12 crate compacting + M-10 ancient_wood imbuement. Big deco surface; tag-batch the M-04. Medium.
railways: Steam'n'Rails — M-04 locometal crush + M-33 conductor service. Trains are largely additive; the M-31 bulk-structural logistics tie is the economy edge. Light-to-medium.
rechiseled: M-04/M-20 via rechiseledcreate Mechanical Chisel — already its Create bridge. Agree, the kinetic-chisel IS the weave. Leave.
rechiseledcreate: Agree, leave — it IS the Create-deco bridge.
ribbits: M-21 amethyst-shard trade is **CUT** (#163/#240 NPC-trade faucet). Re-express via player trade or leave. Marginal mod.
rottencreatures: Dense undead-flesh sinks (M-11 ×24/18) + M-19 haunting. Strong occult feedstock; ties the #106 spawn-allowlist already done. Author magic-side.
s_a_b: ⚠ Auto-mapper mislabel — `s_a_b` is **Steel Armor Blocks** (Create: Steel armor blocks), not Sable the perf bridge. M-06/M-23 hardsteel→armor/airframe plate is sound; re-key it to steel-armor-blocks and move to v0.9/v0.13.
samurai_dynasty: jade/ore crush (M-03 ×18) + Yokai drops→spirit_fire (M-02) + M-15 Immortal boss-gate. Already has 20-samurai-dynasty.js; extend the boss/magic edges.
securitycraft: M-05 reinforced-material gate on Create + M-05 sentry via Big Cannons parts (nice cross-addon). Author the Create gate; ties combat.
sereneseasons: **Priority survival lever.** season_sensor→Create logic (M-16 ×18) is the mechanical hook; the whole M-16 motif family depends on it. Author the seasonal gates here; high value.
simplehats: M-09/M-34 rare-hat grab-bags from boss loot. Cosmetic-as-reward; fine flavor edge. Low.
sky_whale_ship: M-15 onboard-loot-chest seeding (×13) → aeronautics-progression loot. Good exploration→aeronautics gate; author loot-side in v0.9.
sliceanddice: M-16 sprinkler-vs-seasons is the interesting edge (food automation answers seasonal penalty); author with survival.
smokeleafindustries: M-17 generator-FE→charging + M-12 hemp milling + M-09 extract-sell. Ties the electric tier (M-17) AND has a sell economy. Decent multi-anchor; mind public-server tone on the 'dealer trade' framing.
snowyspirit: M-12 ginger milling + M-16 winter-gating. Seasonal food; pairs with sereneseasons. Fine.
solmaiddream: 0 accepts — Spice of Life addon, **being replaced by Diet AppleSeed** (SYSTEMS.md). Cut candidate; leave/remove.
spawn: M-12 seafood→fishery + M-09 exotic-catch sell. Fishing content; pairs with tide/createfisheryindustry — watch overlap.
stylecolonies: M-28 Steampunk-style requires Create parts — a nice colony↔Create tie. Author colony-side.
supplementaries: M-12 flax milling + M-10 ash imbuement + M-09 candy. Already heavily woven (94-supplementaries.js). Extend M-12/M-10; mind the Sodium-mixin gotcha on updates (CLAUDE.md).
t_and_t: Towns&Towers loot-seed (M-08/M-15) + M-21 village trade (CUT). Keep the loot-seed, drop the trade-faucet edge. Batch with structures.
tacz: Gun spine — M-05 gunsmith-metal gate + M-06 high-tier sequenced assembly. This IS #112/#185/#187. Author the Create-gated gun path here; the M-09 ammo-sell is ambient.
terralith: Worldgen foundation — M-30 biome-tags are where GTMOGS ore-gen keys (the scarcity map) + M-22 fantastical-biome gating. Substrate, not a node; author #93 against it. **Also see #243** (Trek ocean-spawn fix is adjacent worldgen).
tfmg: Richest aeronautics node (M-13 fuel ×31 / M-23 steel / M-24 engine). M-29 plastic→Create-precision is a strong anti-self-sufficiency gate. Central to #103/#102. Top priority.
tidal-towns-1.3.4: Ocean-village loot-seed (M-08/M-15). Batch with structures. The M-29 'village as aeronautics route-incentive' is a stretch.
tide: M-12 fish→fishmeal + M-09 biome-locked-fish sell + M-30 regional fish. Good scarcity-fishing tie; overlaps spawn/createfisheryindustry — dedup the fishing cluster.
touhou_little_maid: **Load-bearing cut-vertex** (CONNECTIVITY) — M-05 altar + M-10 broom. Its altar recipe-type is a real method to route through. Surprisingly central; preserve. Author the altar/maid weaves.
trading_floor: ⚠ Mapper mislabel (`trading_floor`→ding). It's **Create: Trading Floor**, the economy depot — M-08 depot→coin + M-29 Create-belt→trade bridge. Core economy tool; re-key and author in v0.9, not here.
trailandtales_delight: M-12 lantern_fruit milling (×19) + M-35 cheese maturation + M-09 sell. Strong food node; note it's a delight-family member (overlap audit).
travelersbackpack: M-06/M-20 upgrade-tier sequenced assembly + pressing = solid step-depth. Note the #94 backpack overlap with create-storage — dedup decision.
trek-b0.6.1.1: ⚠ **See #243 first** — Trek's ocean-spawn/square-terrain bug must be fixed before its M-02/M-08/M-15 loot-seed weaves matter. Loot-seed is fine once placement is fixed.
underground_village: M-21 villager-trade (CUT faucet) + M-02/M-08 loot-seed. Keep loot-seed, drop trade-coin. Batch structures.
undergroundworlds: spider_fang→spirit_fire (M-11 ×30, highest in batch) + M-04 temple-brick crush. Strong occult feedstock + deco recycle. Author magic+Create.
upgrade_aquatic: M-09 fish-dish sell + M-04 driftwood crush + M-02 jellyfish drops. Standard; overlaps the fishing cluster. Medium.
valarian_conquest: M-09/M-14 mercenary-hire paid in coin — careful: mercenary hire paying *out* coin is fine, but if it's an NPC *source* of coin it's the cut faucet pattern. M-05 faction-armor via Create gate is good. Flag the coin-flow direction for the v0.9 ruling.
vc_gliders: M-05/M-06 paraglider tiers gated on Create pressed parts (the worked example from chunk-01). Clean; author with the glider tiers. M-19 nether_upgrade via haunting is a tasteful soul touch.
vinery: M-12 grape/apple pressing + M-35 wine maturation + M-09 sell. **Directly relevant to #241** — these strong Create-pressing weaves are the argument that if we cut Vinery for Create: Winery, the replacement must carry the M-12 pressing chain.
woodworks: M-04 wood-deco crush + M-12 beehive + M-10 bookshelf→enchanting. Batch M-04; the bookshelf-enchanting tie is a nice magic touch. Medium.
zombiemoon: Unmapped and likely **absent/cut** (not in our modlist). Skip unless re-added; the M-02/M-11 mob-drop sinks are generic and would apply to any moon mob.
